message: ci: bump pnpm setup action to v6.0.3 (#266)

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ jobs:
           submodules: false
 
       - name: Setup pnpm
-        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v5
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6.0.3
         with:
           version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}
 
@@ -153,7 +153,7 @@ jobs:
           submodules: false
 
       - name: Setup pnpm
-        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v5
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6.0.3
         with:
           version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

       - name: Setup pnpm
-        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v5

         with:

@@ -113,7 +113,7 @@ jobs:
           submodules: false
 
       - name: Setup pnpm
-        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v5
+        uses: pnpm/action-setup@v6.0.3
         with:
           version: ${{ env.PNPM_VERSION }}

@@ -29,7 +29,7 @@ jobs:
